benchmarks.name: quality_2sent
benchmarks.prompt: Summarize why caching is useful in web services in exactly two sentences.

all_runs.response_preview: aching improves response time and user experience by serving repeated requests from fast, local storage instead of hitting the slower application server. It also reduces the load on backend resources, which helps prevent server overload and lowers operational costs during periods of high traffic.
